title: Kyiv: Together with the leaders and representatives of the countries of...
title_en: Kyiv: Together with the leaders and representatives of the countries of...
title_uk: Київ: Разом з лідерами та представниками країн...
description: Together with the leaders and representatives of the countries of Southeast Europe and Ursula von der Leyen, they honored the memory of our fallen soldiers. We thank each and every one of you for starting your visit on the Day of Ukrainian Statehood and the Day of Baptism of Kyivan Rus - Ukraine out of respect for Ukrainian heroes. Eternal respect to Ukrainian men and women who gave their lives for the independence of Ukraine and the security of all of Europe.
description_en: Together with the leaders and representatives of the countries of Southeast Europe and Ursula von der Leyen, they honored the memory of our fallen soldiers. We thank each and every one of you for starting your visit on the Day of Ukrainian Statehood and the Day of Baptism of Kyivan Rus - Ukraine out of respect for Ukrainian heroes. Eternal respect to Ukrainian men and women who gave their lives for the independence of Ukraine and the security of all of Europe.
description_uk: Разом з лідерами і представниками країн Південно-Східної Європи та Урсулою фон дер Ляєн вшанували памʼять наших загиблих воїнів. Ми дякуємо кожному й кожній за те, що розпочали свій візит у День Української Державності і День хрещення Київської Русі – України з поваги до українських героїв. Вічна шана українцям і українкам, що віддали життя заради незалежності України й безпеки всієї Європи.

description: Russian Mi-28 helicopter downed by Ukrainian drone, Madyar claims. The aircraft was hit in Russia’s Belgorod Oblast by soldiers from Ukraine’s 427th separate unmanned systems regiment, Robert “Madyar” Brovdi, commander of Ukraine’s Unmanned Systems Forces, added in a post on social media.

This is no coincidence. This is a deliberate attempt to intimidate Ukraine, our partners and everyone who believes in peace. Only today as a result of...

This is no coincidence. This is a deliberate attempt to intimidate Ukraine, our partners and everyone who believes in peace. Only today as a result of...

Це не збіг. Це свідома спроба залякати Україну, наших партнерів і всіх, хто вірить у мир. Лише сьогодні внаслідок...

title: Strike confirmed
title_en: Strike confirmed
title_uk: Страйк підтверджено
description: 🤬Belarusian gunman Lukashenko seems to have turned on the repeaters again. The adviser to the Minister of Defense "Flash" writes that the morning attack of the Shahed jet on the gas station in Malyna could have been carried out through repeaters on the territory of Belarus. From the point of impact to the border of the Russian Federation is about 260 km, which is too far for the stable operation of a direct radio channel. At the same time, other drones that could perform the role of air...
description_en: 🤬Belarusian gunman Lukashenko seems to have turned on the repeaters again. The adviser to the Minister of Defense "Flash" writes that the morning attack of the Shahed jet on the gas station in Malyna could have been carried out through repeaters on the territory of Belarus. From the point of impact to the border of the Russian Federation is about 260 km, which is too far for the stable operation of a direct radio channel. At the same time, other drones that could perform the role of air...
description_uk: 🤬Белорусский драник Лукашенко, похоже, снова включил ретрансляторы Советник министра обороны «Флэш» пишет, что утренний удар реактивного «Шахеда» по АЗС в Малине мог осуществляться через ретрансляторы на территории Беларуси. От точки удара до границы рф — около 260 км, что слишком далеко для устойчивой работы прямого радиоканала. При этом других дронов, которые могли бы выполнять роль воздушных...

description: 'A missile reaches Kyiv in 2-4 minutes' — official explains air alarm lag during Russian ballistic strikes. "All information about launches or launch preparations comes to us from our partners. ... No system can be perfect, so failures do occur, and the alert may be delayed," Defense Ministry Advisor Serhii Beskrestnov said.
